title: Keoti Falls
tagline: Keoti Falls — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Keoti Falls (also spelt Kevti) is in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: Keoti Falls (also spelt Kevti) is in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is the 24th highest waterfall in India.

topPlaces.name: Badraon Tiwariyan
topPlaces.description: Badaraotiwariyan is a village of Sirmor tehsil (Janpad) in Rewa of Madhya Pradesh in India. It is located 33 km north of Rewa, 11 km from Sirmour, and 509 km from Bhopal.

topPlaces.name: Sirmaur, Madhya Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Sirmaur is a town and a nagar panchayat in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is about 42 kilometers from Rewa.

items.note: Badaraotiwariyan is a village of Sirmor tehsil (Janpad) in Rewa of Madhya Pradesh in India. It is located 33 km north of Rewa, 11 km from Sirmour, and 509 km from Bhopal.
Sirmaur is a town and a nagar panchayat in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is about 42 kilometers from Rewa.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Keoti Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Keoti Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Keoti Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Prayagraj Airport (Bamrauli) (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Satna Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Keoti Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Keoti Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Keoti Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Keoti Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Keoti Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Badraon Tiwariyan, Sirmaur, Madhya Pradesh.
